steps.title: Use the given x value
steps.content:
The first equation in the system already gives the value of $x$, so no rearranging is needed for that coordinate.
$$x=4$$

steps.title: Substitute to find y
steps.content:
Substitute $x=4$ into the second equation and solve for the remaining coordinate.
$$-3(4)+y=-5$$
$$-12+y=-5$$
$$y=7$$

steps.title: Find the requested sum
steps.content:
Now add the two coordinates because the question asks for $x+y$.
$$x+y=4+7=11$$
The answer is C.
